title: Minimum Sum of Four Digit Number After Splitting Digits
titleCn: 拆分数位后四位数字的最小和

testcases.input: num = 2932 Output: 52 Explanation: Some possible pairs [new1, new2] are [29, 23], [223, 9], etc. The minimum sum can be obtained by the pair [29, 23]: 29 + 23 = 52.
testcases.expectedOutput: 52 Explanation: Some possible pairs [new1, new2] are [29, 23], [223, 9], etc. The minimum sum can be obtained by the pair [29, 23]: 29 + 23 = 52.

testcases.input: num = 4009 Output: 13 Explanation: Some possible pairs [new1, new2] are [0, 49], [490, 0], etc. The minimum sum can be obtained by the pair [4, 9]: 4 + 9 = 13.
testcases.expectedOutput: 13 Explanation: Some possible pairs [new1, new2] are [0, 49], [490, 0], etc. The minimum sum can be obtained by the pair [4, 9]: 4 + 9 = 13.
